title: Personalized To-Do List Generator
scenario: Create a personalized to-do list generator that takes in a user's tasks, deadlines, and priorities. The tool should output a formatted to-do list with the tasks, deadlines, and priorities. Ensure the format meets standard to-do list requirements.
constraints: Must use standard to-do list formatting

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated markdown adheres to the constraints.
Check if the tasks, deadlines, and priorities are included in the output.
Check if the generated markdown is correctly formatted.
